title.zh: 使用便携式媒体播放器

phrases.en: I plugged some earphones into the jack.
I pressed the on/off button to turn the player on.
phrases.zh: 我按下开关键打开了播放器。

phrases.en: I selected the music icon and touched the name of a playlist.
phrases.zh: 我选中音乐图标，点了一个播放列表的名字。

phrases.en: I pressed a bar on the side to adjust the volume, turned it up to make the music louder.
phrases.zh: 我按侧面的滑条来调节音量，把它调高让音乐变大声。

phrases.en: And turned it down to make the music softer.
phrases.zh: 又把它调低让音乐变小声。

phrases.en: I searched for my favorite song.
phrases.zh: 我搜索了我最喜欢的歌。

phrases.en: And I tapped the screen to play it.
phrases.zh: 并点了一下屏幕来播放它。

phrases.en: To get back to the main menu, I hit the control button.
phrases.zh: 为了回到主菜单，我按了一下控制键。

phrases.en: There were icons for many apps on the main screen.
phrases.zh: 主屏幕上有许多应用的图标。

phrases.en: I touched the icon for the calculator app so I could add some numbers.
phrases.zh: 我点了计算器应用的图标，这样我就能算一些数字。

phrases.en: To turn the player off, I held the on/off button down for five seconds.
phrases.zh: 为了关闭播放器，我按住开关键五秒钟。
